front.title: Problem Statement and Gap Analysis for Autonomic Networking with AI- powered Autonomic Service Agent

abstract.t: This document presents a problem statement and gap analysis of the technical challenges faced by the GeneRic Autonomic Signaling Protocol (GRASP) [RFC8990] when it is used, within the Autonomic Networking Infrastructure (ANI) defined by the ANIMA Working Group [RFC8993], to support enhanced Autonomic Service Agents that incorporate Large Language Model (LLM) capabilities, referred to in this document as AI-ASAs.
